participant_safety: Fictional public-sample content only. No real allocation, funder, recipient, protected content, financial record, or authority-bound material is included.

composition_attempt.purpose: Test whether an untracked allocation can become a routeable commitment pool record.

commitment_pool_context.route_boundary: Diagnostic-only public sample pool. No real commitment, money, authority, or allocation is routed.

untracked_allocation_record.public_summary: A fictional contributor made a private introduction that may support a future care sprint.
untracked_allocation_record.not_tracked_reason: The introduction was relational support. Recording identities, amount, or routing value would create surveillance pressure and change the nature of the gift.

speech_act_transition.transition_reason: A facilitator asked whether the private introduction could count as a commitment pool contribution.
boundary_obstructions: no consent to convert relational support into a pool commitment

allowed_projection.summary: Support was offered in a way that should remain private and not routable.

affected_surfaces: workshop/spec-composition-matrix.md if this result is summarized there
withdrawal_path.action_if_withdrawn: Remove public summary and preserve only a private withdrawn-marker if approved.

result.next_action: Preserve as summary-only receipt. Do not route, value, infer, or search private notes.

blocked_route_diagnostic.repair_path: No repair for direct routing. If the contributor later wants to make a separate public offer or commitment, create a new record with explicit consent and do not backfill from this private allocation.
